description: §18.19 — an EXHAUSTIVE multi-scrutinee `match (r, u)` over the (Role x Role|not) product SHALL NOT fire E-TYPE-006 (nor E-TYPE-020). The two arms `(.Admin, _)` and `(.Editor, _)` cover both Role columns via a per-position `_` on the union position, covering every product cell. Acceptance sibling of e-type-006-multi-scrutinee-union-pos.
rationale: §18.19: a per-position `_` covers all values in that position; `(.Admin, _)` + `(.Editor, _)` together cover the whole Role x (Role|not) product, so product-exhaustiveness is satisfied and no E-TYPE-006 / E-TYPE-020 fires.
